text:
Imagine hiring a brilliant assistant.

You train them all day. 

They do great work.

Then they wake up the next morning with zero memory of who you are.

That's every AI tool you've been using.

Hermes Agent OS was built specifically to end that.

→ Launched February 25th, https://t.co/ngQPKW2O3t

text:
Evening thought.

'AI for SMEs' is a marketing line that's been around for 3 years. Nobody actually shipped it as an end-to-end company — they shipped tools, dashboards, chatbots.

Agent Networks is the AI team, not the AI tool. There's a difference.
